# Brand Identity — Test Brand

## Name

Test Brand

## Tagline

Built for testing, made for distribution.

## Mission

Provide a reliable, versioned brand reference for testing the petal distribution system.

## Story

Test Brand was created to serve as a canonical source for brand distribution integration tests. It follows the .brand/ format contract exactly and provides known, predictable values for assertion.

## Positioning

### Target Audience
- Integration test authors
- CI/CD pipelines
- Petal developers

### Value Proposition
A single, versioned source of truth for brand assets that any project can pull from.

### Differentiators
- Semantic versioning with git tags
- Complete .brand/ directory structure
- Known, deterministic content

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Founded | 2026 |
| Industry | Software Testing |
| Website | https://example.com |
| Brand Version | v1.2.0 |
